context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 29
WINDOW: 480.600s to 517.100s (smile at 500.600s to 502.100s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[434.930-494.610] interviewee: I go to the gate and an older man. But I recognize right away he was not dressed like a European, like an American-- like clothes, fancy.
[494.610-518.200] interviewee: And he said, I'm your uncle. Now, this was in 1932. They came to visit us from the United States. And I took him out to the city. We went to eat. And we went to a Yiddish theatre with him. And we talked about what I'm doing and how long. And I explained to him I'm supposed to serve in the medical corps. But they put me here that I had to serve.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
from the United States.

context_segments.text: I go to the gate and an older man. But I recognize right away he was not dressed like a European, like an American-- like clothes, fancy.

context_segments.speaker: interviewee
context_segments.text: And he said, I'm your uncle. Now, this was in 1932. They came to visit us from the United States. And I took him out to the city. We went to eat. And we went to a Yiddish theatre with him. And we talked about what I'm doing and how long. And I explained to him I'm supposed to serve in the medical corps. But they put me here that I had to serve.
